zeroconf_confirm.title: Salt Sentry found
zeroconf_confirm.description: {name} Salt Sentry found at {host}. Do you want to add this device?

user.title: Set up Salt Sentry
user.description: Select your water softener from the list. Choose 'Other' if your model is not listed and configure the distances manually.

distances.title: Set distances
distances.description: Settings for {model}. A small distance means a full tank (a lot of salt), a large distance means an empty tank.

error.error_full_gt_empty: Full distance must be smaller than empty distance

distances.title: Adjust distances
distances.description: Settings for {model}. A small distance means a full tank, a large distance means an empty tank.
